title: Easy Emerald
description: An easy way to craft emeralds
body:
Bored of having to dig and dig to find just a few emeralds?

With this simple mod you can create them without problems and with few ingredients, you need an Apple and a Ender Pearl.  
***The mod is compatible with: [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)***

![Example of recipe](https://i.imgur.com/xrIGvCK.png)

![Partner link discount](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/112d23b8-9986-4823-80de-d312484cf8c8.webp)
